lines.raw: What did the team find? | 团队发现了什么？

lines.english: Dreams of finding lost treasure almost came true recently.
lines.chinese: 最近，寻找失落宝藏的梦想差点成真。
lines.raw: Dreams of finding lost treasure almost came true recently. | 最近，寻找失落宝藏的梦想差点成真。

lines.english: A new machine called 'The Revealer' has been invented
lines.chinese: 一种名为“揭示者”的新机器被发明出来
lines.raw: A new machine called 'The Revealer' has been invented | 一种名为“揭示者”的新机器被发明出来

lines.english: and it has been used to detect gold which has been buried in the ground.
lines.chinese: 并且它被用来探测埋在地下的黄金。
lines.raw: and it has been used to detect gold which has been buried in the ground. | 并且它被用来探测埋在地下的黄金。

lines.english: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore where--it is said--pirates used to hide gold.
lines.chinese: 这台机器被用在海边的一个洞穴里，据说海盗曾在那儿藏匿黄金。
lines.raw: The machine was used in a cave near the seashore where--it is said--pirates used to hide gold. | 这台机器被用在海边的一个洞穴里，据说海盗曾在那儿藏匿黄金。

lines.english: The pirates would often bury gold in the cave and then fail to collect it.
lines.chinese: 海盗们经常把黄金埋在洞穴里，然后却未能取走。
lines.raw: The pirates would often bury gold in the cave and then fail to collect it. | 海盗们经常把黄金埋在洞穴里，然后却未能取走。

lines.english: Armed with the new machine, a search party went into the cave hoping to find buried treasure.
lines.chinese: 带着这台新机器，一支搜索队进入洞穴，希望能找到埋藏的宝藏。
lines.raw: Armed with the new machine, a search party went into the cave hoping to find buried treasure. | 带着这台新机器，一支搜索队进入洞穴，希望能找到埋藏的宝藏。

lines.english: The leader of the party was examining the soil near the entrance to the cave when the machine showed that there was gold under the ground.
lines.chinese: 当机器显示地下有黄金时，搜索队的队长正在检查洞穴入口附近的泥土。
lines.raw: The leader of the party was examining the soil near the entrance to the cave when the machine showed that there was gold under the ground. | 当机器显示地下有黄金时，搜索队的队长正在检查洞穴入口附近的泥土。

lines.english: Very excited, the party dug a hole two feet deep.
lines.chinese: 队员们非常兴奋，挖了一个两英尺深的洞。
lines.raw: Very excited, the party dug a hole two feet deep. | 队员们非常兴奋，挖了一个两英尺深的洞。

lines.english: They finally found a small gold coin which was almost worthless.
lines.chinese: 他们最终发现了一枚几乎毫无价值的小金币。
lines.raw: They finally found a small gold coin which was almost worthless. | 他们最终发现了一枚几乎毫无价值的小金币。

lines.english: The party then searched the whole cave thoroughly but did not find anything except an empty tin trunk.
lines.chinese: 随后，队员们彻底搜查了整个洞穴，但除了一个空锡箱外什么也没找到。
lines.raw: The party then searched the whole cave thoroughly but did not find anything except an empty tin trunk. | 随后，队员们彻底搜查了整个洞穴，但除了一个空锡箱外什么也没找到。

lines.english: In spite of this, many people are confident that 'The Revealer' may reveal something of value fairly soon.
lines.chinese: 尽管如此，许多人仍然相信，“揭示者”很快会揭示出一些有价值的东西。
lines.raw: In spite of this, many people are confident that 'The Revealer' may reveal something of value fairly soon. | 尽管如此，许多人仍然相信，“揭示者”很快会揭示出一些有价值的东西。
